query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.startTime,
  ma.endTime,
  ma.type AS modalidade,
  ma.status,
  ma.title,
  ma.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  COUNT(ap.id) AS total_participantes
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY ma.id, ma.scheduledDate, ma.startTime, ma.endTime, ma.type, ma.status, ma.title, ma.consultorId, c.name
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.startTime;

SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.startTime,
  ma.endTime,
  ma.type AS modalidade,
  ma.status,
  ma.title,
  ma.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  COUNT(ap.id) AS total_participantes
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY ma.id, ma.scheduledDate, ma.startTime, ma.endTime, ma.type, ma.status, ma.title, ma.consultorId, c.name
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.startTime;
